name: long_content
description: Very long content strings (tens to hundreds of kilobytes) must survive conversion without truncation, timeout, or excessive slowdown -- the converter does no size-based special-casing, so this documents that property empirically rather than assuming it.

test_cases.description: A ~10,000 character user message converts intact; a unique marker placed at the very end proves nothing was truncated.
